scripts.dev: npm run dev:landing & npm run dev:foodlocalwhatsapp & npm run dev:food-pro & npm run dev:foodlocalchat & npm run dev:products-local & npm run dev:productslocalchat & npm run dev:productslocalemail
scripts.build: npm run build:landing && npm run build:foodlocalwhatsapp && npm run build:food-pro && npm run build:foodlocalchat && npm run build:products-local && npm run build:productslocalchat && npm run build:productslocalemail
scripts.install:all: cd landing && npm install && cd ../foodlocalwhatsapp && npm install && cd ../food-pro && npm install && cd ../foodlocalchat && npm install && cd ../products-local && npm install && cd ../productslocalchat && npm install && cd ../productslocalemail && npm install
